---
title: 'Tires'
date: '2011-10-03T22:59:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7370941862080911487'
blogger_filename: '/2011/10/tires.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Car'
  - 'Need'
---

Bridgestone Ecopia EP20 Size 195/65R15 Set of Four: $391.96 plus stems and balance. NTB&nbsp;<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #fdfdfd; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px;">Part # BS16519655/103689</span><br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #fdfdfd; font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px;"><br /></span><br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #fdfdfd;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px;">I believe I receive the provision of God according to&nbsp;Philippians&nbsp;4:13, $450 for new tires for the 2002 Saturn L100 Sedan.&nbsp;</span></span></span><br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #fdfdfd;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px;"><br /></span></span></span><br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="background-color: #fdfdfd;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></span></span>
